sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114071" key="xiono/xroos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χῐονό-χροος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, heterocl. acc. pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-χροας,</foreign> <sense id="n114071.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">snow-white,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μᾶζαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.6</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
